doctorLines: web      ready                The hardened public-web crawler is ready.
github   ready                Public GitHub REST is ready at the unauthenticated rate limit.
youtube  partial              Public oEmbed metadata reads are ready; search requires YOUTUBE_API_KEY.
x        missing_credentials  Set X_BEARER_TOKEN for approved X API v2 access.
reddit   missing_credentials  Set REDDIT_CLIENT_ID, REDDIT_CLIENT_SECRET, and COCKROACH_REDDIT_USER_AGENT.
helpLines: --url-file <file>       Read seed URLs from a text file, one URL per line
--max-depth <n>         Maximum link depth from seeds. Default: 2
--max-requests <n>      Total network-request budget. Default: derived from max-pages
--max-bytes <n>         Maximum decoded bytes per page. Default: 3145728
--sitemaps              Discover URLs from robots.txt sitemaps and /sitemap.xml
--all-origins           Use the explicit --allow-origin allowlist across origins
--allow-origin <origin> Permit an HTTP(S) origin. Can be repeated
testLines: ✔ crawler respects robots.txt and extracts linked pages
✔ per-response and total byte budgets stop oversized content
✔ Azure and other provider platform endpoints are denied in every supported form
✔ every redirect hop is origin-checked before the target receives a request
✔ serverless redirect validation blocks an origin escape before target contact
✔ X provider requires official bearer configuration and never serializes it
✔ Reddit provider uses application-only OAuth, caches the token, and normalizes posts

benchmark.name: cockroach-crawler-local-regression
benchmark.disclaimer: Project-local 120-page regression fixture; not an industry or global benchmark.
